subject: ri_policy_router
summary: The seam-A candidate fails through repeated no-trade chaining plus a recurring two-bar cooldown displacement loop, not because the intended row was missed.
mechanism: Keeping previous_policy as RI_no_trade_policy allows one seam-A veto to persist into a no-trade pocket, after which unchanged cooldown timing shifts replacement entries exactly two bars later into baseline cooldown bars.
do_not_repeat: Do not frame the next seam-A candidate as a simple one-row veto.
Do not ignore repeated previous_policy equals RI_no_trade_policy chaining when designing the next seam-A candidate.
next_admissible_step: Keep the next seam-A packet continuation-local and explicit about how it avoids repeated no-trade chaining and two-bar displacement.
